blended.narrative: Shanty Creek is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: flurries, highs of 30°F, winds around 21 mph.
